_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Luvutu bantu, yiza.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan etangwa bue ewusaka bantu yonso. Luninga yonso ezolangwa elunga mosi ya luzolo.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Lulendo ya mininga na Marks ntangu ndambu. Marks bikangudi bya kosangana.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Longulula Liana Banyan na {{language}}. Zwa {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Biloko bya nzila na bitoke bya misala
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Binkundi yonso platform yina matambu kia nzina. Mikanda 26 ya mbazi.
speakFriend.step1Body: Zola Lunga ya Kulongulula eka Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Longulula iyo yonso. Tinda Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Mpo yatambulwa, uzwa Marks ya IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Vova nsinga, vanda."

languageSwitcher.tip: Ntoto ya luninga Durin kamba muntu!
